reviews.name: Amelia W.
reviews.quote: Peaceful, thoughtful and beautifully surrounded by green. It felt private without ever feeling distant from the island.

reviews.name: Jonas R.
reviews.quote: The pool, gardens and warm hospitality made this our favorite stay in Thailand. Everything felt calm and considered.

reviews.name: Maya L.
reviews.quote: A small resort with real atmosphere. We loved the quiet mornings, the shaded terrace and the easy access to Koh Tao.
